title: Associate Consultant
description:
We are seeking a skilled and motivated ServiceNow Software Developer with 7-10 years of hands-on experience in developing, configuring, and enhancing the ServiceNow platform.

The ideal candidate will play a key role in designing solutions, implementing solutions, improving workflows, and delivering high-quality technical outcomes that support business needs. The candidate will also need to collaborate with business and operations teams to deliver their requirements, including building dashboards for reporting and insights

Responsibilities

  • Gather and analyse user requirements, prepare technical specifications/design and estimate impact & efforts
  • Design, Develop, configure, and customize ServiceNow applications and modules (ITSM, CMDB, ITAM, ITOM). Build and customize platform components including Business Rules, Client Scripts, Script Includes, UI Policies, UI Actions, Flows, Data Policies, and Catalog Items
  • Perform data engineering tasks including data analysis, data transformation, and data validation. Integrate data from multiple sources and build, maintain, and optimize ETL pipelines
  • Automate operational tasks (eg: for reconciliation) using scripting (shell script, power shell java script) or programming languages (Python)
  • Provide technical support for applications/tools supported by enablement team, including incident/problem troubleshooting, resolution and performance optimization
  • Ensure compliance with ITIL best practices and IT standards, securities and governance
  • Collaborate with application, infrastructure, security, and operations teams, report status and progress regularly
  • Prepare and update the relevant documentations as required
  • Document processes, configurations, knowledgebases and best practices
  • Willing to learn new things and be assigned for additional task to support IT Operation tools (ITSM, ITAM, PAM, Asset Discovery, CMDB, DevSecOps, Observability) BAU/project in the organization


Experience Required

General Knowledge

  • Good knowledge and understanding of ITIL processes, IT Operations (ITSM, ITAM, PAM, Asset Discovery, CMDB, DevSecOps, Observability).
  • Experience working with SDLC methodologies including requirement analysis, design, development, testing and deployment.

Technical Skills

  • Experience in ServiceNow development and customization (workflows, business rules, UI components, ITSM, ITAM, CMDB, ITOM).
  • Experience of data wrangling, cleaning, transformation, and integration techniques.
  • Familiarity in programming & scripting: Python, Unix Shell, PowerShell, JavaScript.
  • Familiarity with REST API and SOAP web services.
  • Experience with JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and good knowledge of web technologies.
  • Experience in system or tools integration.
  • Experience in DevSecOps tools, CI/CD pipeline design, development and automation.
  • Experience with Power BI/Kibana/Grafana for data visualization & data modelling.

Certifications:

  • ServiceNow certifications such as CSA (Certified System Administrator) and CAD (Certified Application Developer)

postedCompany.description: OPTIMUM SOLUTIONS (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD is Singapore-headquartered IT Outsourcing firm specialising in Software Engineering, Application Development & Support, IT Infrastructure Management. Having started in March 1997, we have grown to one of the largest IT Services firms in Singapore providing Digital Transformation Services to its clients.
